findings.title: Protected Paths enforcement documented as live but no hooks or workflows exist
findings.detail: SECURITY.md WARNING states enforcement was newly wired 2026-05-21 via first PR. Verification: the controls DO exist (.husky/pre-commit, .github/CODEOWNERS, .github/workflows/protected-paths.yml). Finding was based on initial scan before first PR was confirmed merged. Downgraded: the actual gap is that SECURITY.md WARNING is still worded as forward-looking rather than confirmed-live.
findings.fix_sketch: Update SECURITY.md WARNING from 'newly wired' to 'confirmed live and verified' since PR #1 has merged.

findings.title: KPI launch gate logically impossible — populated_when postdates Tier3 go-no-go
findings.detail: KPI.md populated_when: M-016 ships AND 7 days of data. RISKS.md R-010 says KPI.md MUST be populated before launch (gate). Since KPI.md is only populated when M-016 ships, and M-016 IS the launch milestone, this creates an impossible sequencing: the gate requires data that can only exist post-launch. The fix is to clarify that KPI.md is gated at M-017 (Tier3 self-healing), not M-016, and that a baseline metric subset must be captured before M-016 to unblock M-017.
findings.fix_sketch: Update RISKS.md R-010 mitigation to distinguish: M-016 gate requires baseline KPI targets defined; M-017 gate requires 7 days of production data populated.

findings.title: AGENTS.md cites ADR-0008 for testing philosophy but ADR-0008 covers ADR format only
findings.detail: AGENTS.md §8 Testing (line 140) directs client-repo workers to 'see ADR-0008 (testing philosophy)'. ADR-0008 is titled 'MADR format for ADRs; append-only via filename' and contains zero testing guidance. The testing approach is actually in NON_GOALS.md NG-7 (smoke tests only). Workers following the reference find irrelevant ADR format rules.
findings.fix_sketch: Change 'see ADR-0008 (testing philosophy)' to 'see NON_GOALS.md NG-7' in AGENTS.md line 140.

findings.title: Retell platform decision marked pending but architecture treats it as locked
findings.detail: ADR-0006 title says 'pending Esme R1 confirmation' and STAKEHOLDERS.md decision log also marks it pending. However ARCHITECTURE.md, INTEGRATIONS.md, and SPRINT.md all treat Retell as the locked choice. If Esme's R1 confirms Retell, no action needed; if not, the rework scope is large and undocumented. A deadline for the R1 confirmation is missing.
findings.fix_sketch: Update ROADMAP.md to add explicit decision deadline for Esme R1 confirmation. Update ADR-0006 when confirmation arrives.

findings.title: RUNBOOK SLOs are TBD with no process to define them before first incident
findings.detail: RUNBOOK.md trigger rules reference TBD per-product SLOs. No SLO is defined for Factory's own operations (IFleet, n8n, voice-discovery). The escalation matrix defines SLAs without traceable SLO derivation. Without defined SLOs, operators cannot determine incident severity or correct escalation path.
findings.fix_sketch: Add 'Factory SLOs' section to RUNBOOK.md defining target uptime/response for key services. Derive SLA thresholds from these SLOs.

findings.title: ADR-0006 truncated — missing Decision Outcome and Consequences sections
findings.detail: FALSE POSITIVE — ADR-0006 is fully complete with Decision Outcome, Consequences, Confirmation, and Related sections. Finding was based on incorrect initial scan. No fix needed.
findings.fix_sketch: No fix needed — ADR-0006 is complete.

findings.title: Protected Paths glob patterns unvalidated — parentheses pattern is non-standard
findings.detail: SECURITY.md Protected Paths glob at line 67 uses `**/(auth)/**`. In standard minimatch glob syntax, bare parentheses are not special — this pattern matches literal directory names containing `(auth)` not paths with an `auth` component. The intended glob is `**/auth/**`. No validation process is documented.
findings.fix_sketch: Change `**/(auth)/**` to `**/auth/**` in SECURITY.md Protected Paths block.

findings.title: Three status_page URLs in INTEGRATIONS.md are unverified or TBD
findings.detail: INTEGRATIONS.md has three status pages marked as unverified or TBD: Retell ('verify URL post-account-creation'), n8n self-hosted ('TBD if set up'), and Hostinger (not checked in this audit). Operators checking these links during incidents may find broken URLs.
findings.fix_sketch: Mark unverified URLs explicitly with [UNVERIFIED] prefix and add verification task to onboarding checklist.

findings.title: Logging cross-cutting concern undefined — no schema, levels, or PII rules
findings.detail: ARCHITECTURE.md §6 lists logging as a cross-cutting concern but no document defines the log schema, level taxonomy, or PII redaction rules. Per-client repos will define their own logging ad-hoc, violating the architectural invariant that cross-cutting concerns are AGENTS.md-enforced patterns.
findings.fix_sketch: Add logging schema definition to AGENTS.md §6 or create ADR-0011. Requires research into existing IFleet logging patterns.

findings.title: DECISIONS.md auto-generation not wired; manual maintenance will drift
findings.detail: DECISIONS.md frontmatter admits auto-generation is not yet wired and is manually maintained. No pre-commit hook enforces consistency between ADR files and the DECISIONS.md index. When a new ADR is added, DECISIONS.md can fall out of sync silently.
findings.fix_sketch: Add a note to DECISIONS.md and AGENTS.md §8 that any ADR addition must include a DECISIONS.md update. Wire automation as part of M-002.

findings.title: README.md target operational date is stale — sprint ended without delivery
findings.detail: README.md line 7 states 'Target operational date: end of Day 5 (2026-05-20).' The sprint completed 2026-05-21 without delivering the operational system. The date is now 3 days in the past and misleading.
findings.fix_sketch: Update README.md to reflect current status: initial sprint completed, system not yet operational, next sprint planned.

findings.title: 13 of 18 spec files have last_updated 2026-05-15 despite 2026-05-21 reconciliation
findings.detail: Most spec files show last_updated: 2026-05-15 even though sprint reconciliation occurred 2026-05-21. Readers cannot tell which files are current. SPRINT.md and CHANGELOG.md correctly show 2026-05-21.
findings.fix_sketch: Bulk update last_updated to 2026-05-21 for all files whose content was reviewed during the 2026-05-21 reconciliation.

findings.title: SECURITY.md Protected Paths uses non-standard parentheses glob syntax
findings.detail: Covered by AUDIT-factory-0178498f fix — same line, same edit.
findings.fix_sketch: Fixed as part of IMPORTANT glob pattern fix.
